# docs(blog): raise the two underselling Agent-OS posts to the goose-bumps bar

Part of #14310 · follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** `learn/blog/ai-agents-runtime-possession.md` + `learn/blog/cross-family-verification.md` **undersell** — they don't convey how far ahead the implemented reality is.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Each lands the friction → implemented → proof spine + the goose-bumps bar; consistent with the new intro framing.
- [ ] Honest (hard-requirement vs super-cool-optional); concrete proof, no overclaim.

**Files:** `learn/blog/ai-agents-runtime-possession.md`, `learn/blog/cross-family-verification.md`.
